name: U.S. Bank Shopper Cash Rewards® Visa Signature® Card
annual_fee_description: $0 intro annual fee for the first year, then $95/year.

welcome_offer.description: Earn a $250 bonus after spending $2,000 in eligible purchases within the first 120 days of account opening.

earning_rates.notes: 6% cash back on the first $1,500 in combined eligible purchases each quarter with two retailers you choose.
3% cash back on the first $1,500 in eligible purchases each quarter in one everyday category you choose, such as wholesale clubs, gas and EV charging stations, bills and utilities.

earning_rates.category: Prepaid hotels and car rentals through U.S. Bank Travel Center
earning_rates.notes: 5.5% cash back on hotel and car reservations booked directly in the Travel Center.
1.5% cash back on all other eligible purchases.

selectable_rewards.cap: 6% applies to first $1,500 in combined eligible purchases each quarter with two chosen retailers; 3% applies to first $1,500 each quarter in one chosen everyday category.

other_benefits.name: U.S. Bank Cash-back deals
other_benefits.description: Personalized merchant offers accessible through U.S. Bank online banking or mobile app.

other_benefits.name: U.S. Bank ExtendPay Plan offer
other_benefits.description: New cardmember $0 fee offer on ExtendPay Plans opened in the first 60 days after account opening.

sources.notes: Official U.S. Bank Shopper Cash Rewards page; verified 2026-06-13.

notes: Quarterly selectable retailer/everyday-category card; first-year annual fee is waived, then $95/year.
